name: Almond Coconut Christmas Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the confectioner's sugar, shredded coconut, cream, almond extract, and melted butter or margarine.
2. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Divide the mixture into three equal parts.
4. Color one part pink to red, one part green, and leave the other part white.
5. Shape each colored portion into 3/4 - 1 inch fat balls.
6. Roll each ball in the remaining shredded coconut.
7. Let stand about 24 hours for the balls to firm up.
8. Makes 2 - 3 dozen balls.
